zh.lifeSummary: Francis Southwell是Sir Richard Southwell II 和Amy Witchingham的兒子，於大約1476年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可武德利辛。他於1503年與Dorothy Tendering在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1512年在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: Southwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English south ‘south’ + wel(le) ‘well, pool, spring’ (Old English sūth + wella). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived ‘by the south well’ or ‘south of the well’, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Southwell (Nottinghamshire) or Southwell on the Isle of Portland (Dorset).
in Yorkshire and Lancashire, often a hypercorrect form of Soothill, a habitational name from Soothill in Dewsbury (Yorkshire), from Old English sōt ‘soot’ + hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

en.lifeSummary: Francis Southwell was born about 1476, in Woodrising, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of Sir Richard Southwell II  and Amy Witchingham. He married Dorothy Tendering in 1503, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1512, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

ko.Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Francis Southwell(은)는 대략 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 우드리징에서 Sir Richard Southwell II (와)과 Amy Witchingham의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Dorothy Tendering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Francis Southwell родился около 1476 г. в местности вудрисинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Sir Richard Southwell II  и Amy Witchingham. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Tendering в 1503 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1512 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
